response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:15: Identified a cover song featuring Inugami Korone. The choreography and audio clearly match Kenshi Yonezu's 'KICK BACK', though with parody lyrics. I have labeled this as 'KICK BACK (Parody)'. 2. 01:15-01:32: Transitional scene identified. 3. 01:32-05:00: Identified 'Mafiosa' by FAKE TYPE. using on-screen credits. Conducted searches but exact lyrics for this specific track were not returned by search tools. I have transcribed the lyrics from the audio. 4. Compiled JSON.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring Inugami Korone for her 7th anniversary. The video includes a mashup/parody cover of 'KICK BACK' by Kenshi Yonezu and a performance of the original song 'Mafiosa' by FAKE TYPE.

scenes.description: The video begins with an intro song featuring Inugami Korone singing a parody version of 'KICK BACK'. Text overlay 'PANTSU' appears. The performance includes a large group of dancing mascot characters.

scenes.description: Transitional scene with a black background and a vase of flowers. No vocal music.
Inugami Korone performs the original song 'Mafiosa' by FAKE TYPE. The performance features intense choreography and stylized visual effects. Credits indicate TOPHAMHAT-KYO and DYES IWASAKI.
